name: @cellix/config-typescript
description: Reimplemented TypeScript config patterns (inspired by cellixjs, modernized for Node 24 + no graphql). Extension point.

scripts.lint: biome lint --no-errors-on-unmatched || echo 'config lint (no ts sources)'
scripts.format:check: biome format --no-errors-on-unmatched || echo 'config format:check (no ts sources)'
